view.title: Validate explicit UC need #11
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to confirm the requirement for the new customer onboarding sequence.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 11 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to confirm the requirement for the new customer onboarding sequence.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to confirm the requirement for the new customer onboarding sequence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of a specific onboarding sequence for new customers, which includes multiple email touchpoints over a 30-day period. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this sequence is implemented or functioning as required. The lack of direct evidence to confirm the onboarding emails means the requirement cannot be validated, leading to an inconclusive status.
